## Pull Request Type

<!--
Describe the kind of change in this pull request. If one of the focused
templates below matches the change, use that template instead:

- New skill: .github/PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE/skill-new.md
- Existing skill update: .github/PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE/skill-update.md
- Repository maintenance, documentation, tooling, or templates:
  .github/PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE/maintenance.md
-->

---

## Checklist

- [ ] Scope is limited to one skill or repository concern.
- [ ] No local paths, credentials, private URLs, or workspace-specific details.
- [ ] Documentation is updated if behavior, installation, usage, or available skills changed.
- [ ] Relevant validation is listed below.

---

## Description

<!--
Summarize what changed, why it is useful, and which skill, agent, or repository
area is affected.
-->

---

## Linked Issue

<!--
Link the relevant issue. Use `Closes #<issue-number>` when this PR fully
resolves it.
-->

Closes #

List checks, commands, review steps, or agent/tool verification performed. If
